title: Hollow Hearts
description: Hollow Knight hearts in a Minecraft-like style
body:
# **Hollow Hearts Pack**

**Replaces the default minecraft hearts with Hollow Knight-inspired hearts. Clean and simple.**

![Normal Hearts and Absorption Hearts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d21c9d87b562909f729815d1621d45878a4e40f2.png)
